top_signals.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
top_signals.summary: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China, India ran separate spying campaigns against same Pakistani police force
top_signals.summary: The activity, in some cases breaching the exact same systems, ran between February 2024 and April 2026 and centered on the force responsible for the country’s southwestern province that has been the site of a long-running separatist insurgency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
top_signals.summary: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
